_comment: Single source of truth for claude-statusline settings. The renderer (statusline.sh) reads its defaults from here; the config engine (statusline-config.py) reads types/aliases/constraints from here to validate writes and drive the /statusline menu. The on-disk config file holds ONLY the values the user has overridden. To add a new setting, add a leaf node below; every consumer picks it up automatically.

segments.label: Segments
segments.help: Toggle which pieces of info appear in the status line.

workspace.label: Workspace
workspace.help: Show the current working directory (last two path components).

branch.label: Git branch
branch.help: Show the current git branch when inside a repository.

dirty.label: Dirty marker
dirty.help: Show a '*' after the branch when the working tree has uncommitted changes (staged or unstaged).

diff.label: Line changes
diff.help: Show lines added/removed by the assistant this session (e.g. '+12/-3').

effort.label: Effort level
effort.help: Show the current reasoning effort (e.g. 'max effort'). Hidden automatically when the model doesn't support an effort level.

context.label: Context usage
context.help: Show the context-window usage bar and percentage.

cost.label: Session cost
cost.help: Show the session's running cost in USD (e.g. '$1.23').

five_hour.label: 5-hour rate limit
five_hour.help: Show 5-hour rate-limit usage and time until reset.

seven_day.label: 7-day rate limit
seven_day.help: Show 7-day rate-limit usage and time until reset.

burn_rate.label: Burn-rate flag
burn_rate.help: Show a 🔴/🟢 flag after each rate-limit reset time. 🔴 means your current spend rate will hit 100% before the window resets; 🟢 means you're on pace or have headroom. Computed from used_percentage + resets_at only.

context.label: Context thresholds
context.help: Token counts where the context bar changes colour.

yellow_tokens.label: Yellow threshold
yellow_tokens.help: Tokens used at which the context bar turns yellow. Accepts forms like 200000 or 200k.

red_tokens.label: Red threshold
red_tokens.help: Tokens used at which the context bar turns red. Must be >= the yellow threshold. Accepts forms like 250000 or 250k.

constraints.message: red_tokens must be >= yellow_tokens (the red threshold cannot be lower than the yellow one).
